issue_summary: switch from Weight (interface) to QueryWeight (abstract class); mate in/out-of docID order scoring between Collector & Scorer
javadoc_before: /** Construct a TermScorer. * @param weight The weight of the Term in the query. * @param td An iterator over the documents matching the Term. * @param similarity The Similarity implementation to be used for score computations. * @param norms The field norms of the document fields for the Term. */
javadoc_after: /** * Construct a TermScorer. * * @param weight * The weight of the Term in the query. * @param td * An iterator over the documents matching the Term. * @param similarity * The Similarity implementation to be used for score * computations. * @param norms * The field norms of the document fields for the Term. * * @deprecated use delete in 3.0, kept around for TestTermScorer in tag which * creates TermScorer directly, and cannot pass in a QueryWeight * object. */
